item.title: Home 🏠
item.description:
👋 Welcome#

This is Xingyu Mu (穆星宇), you can call me Terry Mu if you believe x /ɕ/ and yu /y/ (the umlaut-u, ü) are hard to pronounce; or just call me Cybercricetus🐹!

👨‍💻 About#

  • 🎓 M.S. in Computer Science @ NYU Tandon (2025 – 2027) · GPA 4.0 / 4.0
  • 🪄 B.S. in Computer Science @ NYU Tandon (May 2025) · GPA 3.986 / 4.0 Highest GPA in the CSE department · 🏆 Pearl Brownstein Senior Award
  • 🔬 Preference: LLM, RL — currently into agents, RAG, and alignment (DPO / PPO / GRPO)
  • 🌏 Based in NYC · originally from China

📫 Find me at#

  • 📧 Email — Work: xm2204[at]nyu[dot]edu; Personal: mutong221[at]gmail[dot]com
  • 🐙 GitHub — Cybercricetus
  • 🔗 LinkedIn — Xingyu Mu

💼 Recently#

  • Applied ML SWE Intern @ ByteDance (May – Aug 2025) Re-architected a personalized-LLM training pipeline into a resumable state machine, parallelized API-bound stages, added a cache-aware ChromaDB layer, and shipped a 4-judge auto-eval system scoring helpfulness / correctness / empathy / completeness.
  • Teaching Assistant — CS-UY 3224 Operating Systems @ NYU Tandon (Sep 2024 – present) Supporting 150+ students through C, x86, concurrency, and memory management.
  • Research Assistant @ NYU AI4ce Lab — multimodal street-data collection (MapNYC).

🚀 Things I’ve built#

  • Lazy Terminal — a GPT-style assistant that talks to your shell via the Model Context Protocol. Type English, get multi-line scripts. Universal MCP client (HTTP + STDIO), manifest-based tool discovery, GPT / DeepSeek backends.
  • VOC Leakage Detection Robot (NYU UGSRP) — Jetson Orin Nano + CNN (ResNet-18 / AlexNet) that sniffs out volatile organic compounds at 90–95 % accuracy. Tested in a BSL-2 lab with SGP-40 sensors.
  • MapNYC (AI4ce Lab) — LiDAR + stereo capture rig roaming Manhattan, fused through a custom ROS pipeline into 3-D point clouds.

🛠️ Toolbox#

  • Languages — Python · C / C++ · Rust · Java · CUDA · Verilog · JS / React · x86-64 ASM
  • ML / AI — PyTorch · TensorFlow · Transformers · LoRA / QLoRA · DPO · PPO / GRPO · RAG · vector DBs · Mem0 · Ollama

🌱 Off the clock#

Historical linguistics · gym · hiking · reading · gaming
